text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Today, Doto is running in her firstgraded race! Please, please, pleasedon't let what I told her mess her up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto got second place! She's so<n>happy she
comes to thank me for<n>talking to her the other day!
Oooh, her<n>admiration for Opera O is just so...
dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But her admiration doesn't come<n>from a place of
moe—it's her<n>motivating drive! The feelings which
drive Umamusume to run are more<n>pure than I
realized!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I must dash into that brilliant unknown<n>world and
learn its truths. There's<n>nothing to it but to take
another look<n>at the Hyacinth Stakes!
